title: Whitebeam Run
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Whitebeam Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace trade route]] that was popular around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. The Whitebeam Run was an ore shipping route that ran across the [[Stenness Node]] to the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]].<ref name="SWI28">{{InsiderCite|28|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 3}}</ref>
